name: Flower Brain v3: SmearGate + LoRA-TTT + GPTQ — val_bpb 1.0680
author: G3sparky (Gavin Saunders)
category_note: Trained on 1xH100 SXM for 2 hours. Unlimited compute track.
blurb: Flower Brain v3: 6-cell architecture with SmearGate, LoRA-TTT (rank-128, 3-phase AdamW), QK-Gain 5.25, GPTQ int6/int8 compression, depth recurrence. Pre-quant 1.0805. Post-quant GPTQ 1.0933. Sliding window 1.0766. LoRA-TTT final 1.0680. Beats Ifrim unlimited compute leader (1.1239) by 0.056. OUR architecture.
key_changes: SmearGate: learned per-dimension blending with previous token embedding

experimental_findings.conclusion: GPTQ int6 preserves model quality far better than ternary. Ternary research documented as finding.

base: Flower Brain 6-Cell Architecture + SP8192 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals
